_doc: Parallel EN/FR queries for qualitative encoder evaluation. Each query lists `expected_concepts`: a returned tool name counts as a hit iff its normalized subtokens contain every token of at least one concept (concept matching is order-free, case-insensitive, separator-insensitive). This is more lenient than exact-name match but still requires real semantic overlap (e.g. concept 'cancel order' will not match 'modify_pending_order_items' since 'cancel' is missing).

queries.en: cancel my pending order and refund the credit
queries.fr: annule ma commande en attente et rembourse le crédit

queries.en: send a message to my team on slack saying the build is broken
queries.fr: envoie un message à mon équipe sur slack pour dire que le build est cassé
